list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM drive_state ORDER BY run_id DESC

options.content: **RQ1** Reproducibility rate · **RQ2** Breaking rate · **RQ3** Temporal variation · **RQ4** Failure-mode taxonomy. All panels scoped to the run selected above.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id'), 1) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id'), 1) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Breaking vs non-breaking (over reproducible cohort)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Patch bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='patch' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='patch' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Minor bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='minor' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='minor' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: RQ2 — Major bumps: breaking vs non-breaking

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='major' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT e.category AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.version_update_type='major' GROUP BY e.category ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25
targets.queryText: SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS reproducibility_pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS reproducibility_pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, COUNT(*) AS candidates FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

panels.title: RQ3 — ok / not_reproducible split over time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN status='not_reproducible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_reproducible FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) || '-01') AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN status='not_reproducible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_reproducible FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(commit_date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
targets.queryText: SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category='RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category='RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY n DESC
